text: Use your Portal to travel onwards
Slay enemies to lure out an ambush
Remain in the Circle to Charge the Beacon
Reset the Timeline and cleanse it of Corruption
Pray to the Statue of Eterra to reduce Corruption

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire advances into the north to recruit Wengari to their efforts. Two tribes of Wengari are split as they struggle to survive against the Immortal Empire's attacks.

Choose an ally and turn the tide against the empire.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire advances into the north to recruit Wengari to their efforts. The two Wengari clans are split, one side falling in with the Empire, the other resisting. 

Undead Wengari ravage Heoborea. Protect the city and save its remaining inhabitants.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire advances into the north to recruit Wengari to their efforts. The two Wengari clans are split, one side falling in with the Empire, the other resisting. 

Descend into the heart of FormosusΓÇÖ Lair and rescue the living Wengari.
In this timeline, the Shard that granted protection to Last Refuge was lost. The Void invaded and ravaged the city, leaving only a few survivors.
In this timeline, Last Refuge has fallen to the Void. Elder Gaspar has barricaded himself in the Council Chambers and destroyed all of its entrances.
In this timeline, Last Refuge has fallen to the Void. Elder Gaspar has lost hope and betrayed the survivors. Little is left of him but a husk of despair.
In this timeline, Heorot has slain Rahyeh. In the wake of his victory, he has unleashed an unending winter on the world and marches upon his rivals.
In this timeline, Heorot has slain Rahyeh. Grael has led an army of Heoborean warriors to Thetima under HeorotΓÇÖs orders, leaving nothing but destruction in his wake.
In this timeline, Heorot has slain Rahyeh and brought destruction to the people of Solarum, cementing his victory in ice. He must be stopped.

In this timeline, Lagon is attacked by RahyehΓÇÖs forces and driven to unleash a storm on the coast to destroy his enemies, but also his own people in the process. 

Save survivors in a flooded, Meruna infested Thetima.

In this timeline, Lagon is attacked by RahyehΓÇÖs forces and driven to unleash a storm on the coast to destroy his enemies, but also his own people in the process. 

Find a way into LagonΓÇÖs temple in the aftermath of the failed Osprix invasion of LagonΓÇÖs Isle.

In this timeline, Lagon is attacked by RahyehΓÇÖs forces and driven to unleash a storm on the coast to destroy his enemies, but also his own people in the process.  

Slay Lagon to end the storm.

In this timeline, Osprix forces interfere with the retrieval of the Lance of Heorot. 

Race Rahyeh's forces to claim the Blessed Horn.

In this timeline, Osprix forces interfere with the retrieval of the Lance of Heorot. 

Rahyeh's forces approach the Lance of Heorot. Stop them before they can take it.

In this timeline, Osprix forces interfere with the retrieval of the Lance of Heorot and take it for themselves. 

Defeat God Hunter Argentus and reclaim the Lance of Heorot.

In this timeline, the gods failed to exterminate the dragons in the Ancient Era. Instead, the dragons continue to terrorize humanity.

Search for Heorot inside his temple at the behest of a shaman.

In this timeline, the gods failed to exterminate the dragons in the Ancient Era. Instead, the dragons overcame them and usurped the role of the gods in history.

Find and destroy a clutch of Storm Dragon eggs.

In this timeline, the dragons overcame the gods and usurped their role in history. Eventually, they get a taste of necrotic power and create their own reign of undead. 

Slay the Emperor of Corpses.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire secures a decisive victory over the living Outcasts to quell the rebellion. 

Return to the remains of the Outcast Camp to find any survivors.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire secures a decisive victory over the living Outcasts to quell the rebellion. 

The final stand takes place in MajΓÇÖelka between the living and the undead. Fight for the survival of the living.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire secures a decisive victory over the living Outcasts to quell the rebellion. 

Their bodies are going to be used to create an abomination for further research into immortality. Rescue the captured Outcasts before it is too late.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire is in its final days as the Void overwhelms it. 

Help Yulia break Soul Vessels of the hopeless undead so the Void doesnΓÇÖt take them first.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire is in its final days as the Void overwhelms it. 

Chase the Imperial Caravan transporting prisoners to save them from the remnants of the Empire and the Void.

In this timeline, the Immortal Empire is in its final days as the Void overwhelms it. However, to survive, Admiral Harton has turned to embrace the Void. 

Fight this Void-infused Harton among the wreckage of the Dreadnought.

In this timeline, the Void attacks the world before much of humanity was able to escape. Instead, more of the Fallen Osprix survived and plan to use the Void for nefarious purposes. 

The Fallen Osprix and Void cultists have descended upon the town of Ledria.

In this timeline, the Void attacks the world before much of humanity was able to escape. Instead, more of the Fallen Osprix survived and plan to use the Void to bring back their god.

Scale the mountain and confront the cultists and Fallen Osprix before they can resurrect Rahyeh.

In this timeline, the Void attacks the world before much of humanity was able to escape. Instead, more of the Fallen Osprix survived and use the Void to summon their god. 

Rahyeh's husk soars above the waning world like a black sun. Forestall the end. Slay Rahyeh.
In this timeline, the Immortal Shamans rule with necromancy and fire. They have brought destruction to MajΓÇÖelka, and soon to the rest of Eterra.
In this timeline, the Immortal Shamans rule with necromancy and fire. Their minions toil in the fires below in an apocalyptic ritual.
In this timeline, the Immortal Shamans, Bhuldar, Herkir, and Logi, stand atop the caldera. Their world-shattering ritual is nearly complete.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set body armor.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set relics.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set rings or amulets.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set gloves.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set caster weapons (wands, sceptres, staves, or catalysts).
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set melee weapons (swords, axes, maces, daggers, or spears).
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set bows or quivers.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set belts.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set helmets or shields.
In this Timeline echoes can have rewards that grant unique or set boots.

Slay all 7 bosses and their champions
A new champion spawns each time you defeat a boss
Bonus stability increases over time. You will be transported once it is full.
Spend Soul Embers at the Soul Gambler. The first purchase is always a unique.
Slay the Osprix guarding the Forge of Fates
Use the Forge of Fates to shatter Set Items
